creator: pizzamig@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #3)

No, it's exactly as it was, there is no support for FreeBSD in the gdbserver code.
There is no fundamental blocker, it has just to be implemented and maintained.

There is a folder, named gdbserver. There you can see that there are no OS-arch FreeBSD specific files (there is netbsd-amd64, tho).
